title: panicum commutatum var. equilaterale
intro: Panicum commutatum var. equilaterale, also known as blue panic grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health issues, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of blue panic grass include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, blue panic grass is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
